message: Yuriko, the world is going crazy.
Oh, isn't that the latest issue of BAM!? Why would you go and buy something like that?
? I don’t know why you’re so mad, but I’d appreciate it if you’d stop taking it out on me.
Mad, you say!? That damned magazine
When you see it, it's all too obvious!
This? Oh, is it the gossip about Guy and Cindy?
How can you keep that face on!?
Because this can't be true. You don't really believe this article, do you?
Of course! With me around, there's no way Guy could have a girlfriend.
you saw Guy at the party, right? Thinking about that makes me a little anxious.
It’s okay, Kristy. That was just Guy being dramatic.
You know we're in a delicate situation, right? With an article like this during a nervous time,
Hey, could you hang out with me for a bit?
